title: Gateway Provided Config
description: Pilot-managed provided config for the gateway service. Bootstrap-owned fields such as gw_id, grpc_host, grpc_port, nats_url, bootstrap_token, instance_type, and env are not part of this schema.

account_id.description: Primary account identifier exposed by this gateway runtime.

exch_account_id.description: Exchange-side account identifier (e.g. OKX sub-account ID). The semantic pipeline sets this as exch_account_code on outbound balance/position publications so OMS can link exchange-owned state to the managed account.

venue.description: Venue adaptor to load, for example simulator, okx, ibkr, or oanda.

venue_config.description: Opaque venue-specific config payload. Real venue adaptors parse their typed config from this object.

venue_root.description: Optional root path for manifest-driven venue module loading.

exec_shard_count.description: Number of internal gateway execution shards.

exec_queue_capacity.description: Per-shard queue capacity for gateway execution work.
